Built on Trust.
about.description: Saraya Contractors W.L.L. has been delivering quality construction and landscaping services in the Kingdom of Bahrain since 2001. Our three integrated divisions work together to meet the full range of our clients' needs — from civil infrastructure and specialist trading supply to award-winning public green spaces.

meta.title: About — Saraya Contractors W.L.L.
meta.description: Learn about Saraya Contractors W.L.L., a Bahrain-based contractor established in 2001 with divisions in construction, trading, and landscaping.

hero.heading: Saraya Contractors W.L.L.
hero.description: A Bahrain-based contracting company operating since 2001 across construction, trading, and landscaping.

story.heading: Our Story
body: Saraya Contractors W.L.L. was established in 2001 with a clear purpose: to deliver reliable, high-quality contracting services to clients across the Kingdom of Bahrain.

Over two decades, the company has grown from a civil construction operation into a multi-division business serving government bodies, private developers, and commercial clients. Today, Saraya operates across three integrated divisions — Construction, Trading, and Landscaping — giving clients a single trusted partner for complex, multi-discipline projects.
Every project we take on is completed to the same standard: on time, within budget, and built to last.
